name: mcps-monorepo
description: Monorepo centralizado de servidores MCP — Supabase Hub, Communication Bridge e Servidor MCP

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @mcps/shared && npm run build -w @mcps/supabase-hub && npm run build -w @mcps/communication
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @mcps/servidor-api && npm run build -w @mcps/servidor-web
